_comment: Curated ingredient name -> exact KAMIS item-names it may match. For livestock (category_code 500 / 축산물) the FULL KAMIS dailySalesList item_name is kept (e.g. '돼지/삼겹살', '소/등심(1+등급)', '계란/특란10구(일반란)') so cuts/grades stay distinct; for everything else kamis.py still uses the part BEFORE '/' (e.g. '쌀/20kg' -> '쌀'). Matching is EXACT string equality after .strip() against this list. An empty list means the ingredient NEVER matches a live price row (used to kill the false 김치<-김 positive: KAMIS itemname '김' is laver, kindname 마른김/구운김). Each list also includes the curated name itself so the bundled sample_prices.json (which keys rows by the curated name) keeps matching. KAMIS authoritative itemnames verified against _kamis_productinfo.json / _codemap.txt on 2026-05-18.
